Profile.title: Profile
Profile.appThemeDesc: Switch between light and dark mode
Profile.languageUpdateError: Unable to change the language right now.

Login.title: GymTracker
Login.subtitle: Log in to start your session
Login.loginError: Unable to sign in right now.
Login.resetNeedsEmail: Enter your email so we can send a reset link.
Login.resetError: Unable to send the reset email right now.
Login.resetSent: If the email exists, we sent a password reset link.
Login.contactHint: If your account has not been released yet, contact the service owner.

Workouts.title: Workouts
Workouts.createNew: Create a new workout to get started.
Workouts.noAvailableExercises: No available exercises yet. Create a new one below.
Workouts.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
Workouts.archiveExerciseDesc: "{name}" has training history. Archive it to hide from your library while keeping your records — or just remove it from this workout.
Workouts.noExercises: No exercises yet. Add your first one below.
Workouts.cardioSectionDescription: Add cardio blocks to the workout so they can be logged on the day. You can define a name and an optional duration goal.
Workouts.cardioNameRequired: Set a name for the cardio block
Workouts.removeConfirmDesc: Remove "{name}" from this workout? The exercise will remain in your library.
Workouts.exerciseLibrarySubtitle: Manage the base catalog and your own exercises, apply local-only customizations, and review full progression details.
Workouts.exerciseCreateDescription: Personal exercises appear only in your account. Base system exercises can also be customized locally.
Workouts.exerciseCreateError: Unable to create the exercise right now.
Workouts.exerciseSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, modality, or muscle group...
Workouts.exerciseLibraryEmptyDescription: Create your first exercise so you can reuse it across workouts and track global progress.
Workouts.exerciseLibraryNoResultsDescription: Try adjusting the search text or changing the library filter.
Workouts.exerciseOpenDetail: Open it to edit, review progression, and manage its lifecycle.
Workouts.exerciseSystemHint: This is a base system exercise. Your changes apply only to your account.
Workouts.exerciseCustomHint: This exercise belongs only to your account.
Workouts.exerciseFormSystemDescription: Saving creates or updates a local override without changing the base catalog.
Workouts.exerciseFormCustomDescription: Edit this exercise directly in your personal library.
Workouts.exerciseDeleteConfirmDescription: Do you want to delete "{name}" from your library? This action is permanent.
Workouts.exerciseHideConfirmDescription: "{name}" will be hidden only in your account. Other users will still see this base exercise normally.
Workouts.exerciseUpdateError: Unable to update the exercise right now.
Workouts.exerciseArchiveError: Unable to archive the exercise right now.
Workouts.exerciseReactivateError: Unable to reactivate the exercise right now.
Workouts.exerciseDeleteError: Unable to delete the exercise right now.
Workouts.exerciseProgressSubtitle: Combined exercise progress across every workout.
Workouts.exerciseProgressEmptyDescription: Log sets for this exercise to visualize its progression curve.
Workouts.exercisePerformanceEmpty: There is not enough data yet to summarize this exercise's performance.
Workouts.exerciseDeleteAllowed: This exercise can be deleted because it has no history and no workout links.
Workouts.exerciseDeleteHidesLocally: Because it is a base exercise, deleting means hiding it only in your account.
Workouts.exerciseDeleteBlocked: This exercise cannot be deleted because it still has history or linked workouts.
Workouts.exerciseLinkedWorkoutsSubtitle: Quick links to workouts where this exercise is currently present.
Workouts.exerciseNoLinkedWorkouts: This exercise is not linked to any workout right now.

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.noSetsLogged: No sets logged for this session.
Calendar.cardioLogged: This session has cardio logged, but no strength sets were recorded.
Calendar.noWorkoutRecorded: No workout recorded on this day.
Calendar.restDayDesc: No workout scheduled for this day. Recover well!
Calendar.deleteSessionDescription: This removes the workout recorded for that date and all saved sets.
Calendar.notFilledYet: This workout wasn't filled in yet.

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.subtitle: Set a base workout and, if you want, create weekly rotations to vary the exercise selection.
Schedule.goToWorkouts: Go to the Workouts tab first to create some.
Schedule.rotationDescription: Choose when your rotation starts. Each new week the app advances to the next configured variation.
Schedule.rotationUnavailable: Weekly rotation is not available in this environment yet because the latest database migration has not been applied.
Schedule.cycleWeeksDescription: Think about rotations as cycle weeks. Week 1, Week 2, Week 3...
Schedule.weekVariantDescription: If you want variation, change the workout for this week. Otherwise it inherits Week 1.
Schedule.selectWeekWorkout: Select the workout for this week
Schedule.defineWeekOneFirst: Set up Week 1 before configuring other weeks.

Today.historicalView: Historical View: You are logging a past date.
Today.noWorkout: No workout scheduled for today. Recover well!
Today.changeSchedule: Or change your schedule in the Schedule tab.
Today.chooseWorkout: Choose a workout to perform today.
Today.sessionNotesPlaceholder: How did the session feel? Any observations...
Today.doingSomethingElse: Doing something else today? This will replace your current session logs.
Today.rescheduleDesc: Move today's workout to another day. This will swap schedules if the target day is occupied.
Today.toastScheduleSwapped: Schedule swapped and session created for today.
Today.toastWorkoutMoved: Workout moved and session created for today.
Today.toastSetQueuedOffline: Set queued and will sync when you are back online
Today.toastQueuedSetsSyncFailed: Some queued sets are still waiting to sync
Today.toastCardioRequiresMetric: Add at least one cardio metric
Today.toastCardioInvalidInterval: Review the cardio intervals before saving
Today.exerciseSkippedDescription: This exercise was skipped in this session. Undo it if you want to log it again.
Today.cardioSkippedDescription: This cardio block was skipped in this session.
Today.cardioIntervalsHint: Use intervals when you alternate speeds during the cardio block.

BodyMetrics.title: Body metrics
BodyMetrics.correlationNeutral: No clear correlation with the current data.
BodyMetrics.notesPlaceholder: Notes about the measurement, recovery, or context...
BodyMetrics.noPerformanceData: There isn't enough data yet to correlate body metrics and performance.
BodyMetrics.unavailable: Body metrics are not available in this environment yet because the latest database migration has not been applied.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.selectWorkoutPrompt: Select a workout to track your progress and compare sessions.
Analytics.completeWorkoutToCompare: Complete this workout to start tracking your progress.
Analytics.noEvolutionData: No data for this exercise yet.
Analytics.bestSetPerSession: Best set per session (weight × reps → est. 1RM)
Analytics.globalEvolutionSubtitle: Best set across all workouts containing this exercise
